label: Genius Pak
blurb: Data Science, Architecture & Niche Engineering. Deep enterprise infrastructure.

skills.label: Pandas Etl Cleaner
skills.method: Detects anomalies in massive CSVs (mixed date formats, nulls), writes Python script to standardize.
trigger_examples: skips the 80% of data science that is just cleaning data

skills.label: Sql Query Optimizer
skills.method: Runs `EXPLAIN ANALYZE`, identifies missing indexes, rewrites nested JOINs for speed.
trigger_examples: drops dashboard load times from 30s to 1s

skills.label: Grafana Dashboard Generator
skills.method: Reads a list of required KPIs, outputs the exact JSON model to spin up a Grafana UI.

skills.label: Ab Test Statistical Significance
skills.method: Pulls analytics data, calculates p-values and confidence intervals, declares a winner.
trigger_examples: stops product managers from acting on false data

skills.label: Web Scraper Anti Bot Evader
skills.method: Automatically rotates proxies and alters headless browser user-agents when blocked.

skills.label: Pci Compliance Redactor
skills.method: Scans raw server logs via regex/NLP, strips out accidentally logged credit card numbers before storage.

skills.label: Monolith To Microservice Mapper
skills.method: Analyzes codebase call graphs, suggests bounded contexts where the monolith can be safely split.
trigger_examples: the hardest part of enterprise software modernization

skills.label: Iot Telemetry Compressor
skills.method: Rewrites edge-device C++ code to batch and compress MQTT payloads.
trigger_examples: saves millions in cellular iot data costs

skills.label: Ml Model Drift Detector
skills.method: Compares new inference inputs against original training data distributions, alerts if accuracy is decaying.
trigger_examples: prevents ai models from silently going crazy in production
